title: schoenus benthamii
intro: Schoenus benthamii, also known as Bentham's saw-sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schoenus benthamii include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Schoenus benthamii can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
